end,function(O)local D,G=468094+-468093,O[-826363-(-826364)]while G do l[G],D=l[G]-(307503+-307502),D+(352991+-352990)if l[G]==631691+-631691 then l[G],j[G]=nil,nil end G=O[D]end end,function(O,D)local Z=z(D)local c=function(c,o,p,Y,J,j)return G(O,{c;o,p,Y,J;j},D,Z)end return c end return(S(-133957-(-262846),{}))(Z(J))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[D(1023666+-987864)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
